name: DESTINY MEDIA TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: . OVERVIEW AND CORPORATE BACKGROUND Destiny Media Technologies Inc. was incorporated in August 1998 under the laws of the State of Colorado and the corporate jurisdiction was changed to Nevada effective October 8, 2014.
